creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
This problem occurs regularly in the compilation farm for -CURRENT but most of the times version 9.2 is built (when there is no stopper among its dependencies).

I tried to upgrade this port to 9.3 and then to 9.4 (and now 9.5 pre-release versions), without success: it always times out in doc-inventory--reference-manifolds, and I've never been able to fix it.

It does not depend on the version of sphinx: same problem with the patch included in PR 257116.

There was a first problem caused by math/pynac, fixed in pynac-0.7.29 (not yet committed), but this is not sufficient.

Sorry, no good news for the moment: any patch or idea is welcomed!
